mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, parent_id, icon, color, monthly_budget, weekly_budget, alert_threshold, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY type ASC, sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin_first LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM category c INNER JOIN entry e ON e.account_id = c.id AND e.account_type = 'category' INNER JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
